title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering refers to the architecture around an AI coding agent model, comprising rules, skills, hooks, and subagents at the single-session level, and multi-session orchestration at a higher level. Cole Medin emphasizes that harness engineering represents approximately 98% of production systems like Claude Code, with the orchestration of multiple focused agent sessions providing the main leverage for scaling reliable coding tasks.
